data.title: goop kitchen Expands to New York, Marking First Launch Outside California
data.description: A new upscale restaurant, goop kitchen, founded by Gwyneth Paltrow, has recently opened in Midtown West. The restaurant offers clean, chef-crafted dishes for delivery and takeout. With plans for expansion, additional locations are set to launch in Manhattan and Brooklyn. Established in April 2026, goop kitchen has already gained popularity for its high-quality and carefully curated menu.

data.title: GAC Tech Day 2026 Unveils Five Core Technologies to Lead Smart Mobility
data.description: In Guangzhou, China on April 17, 2026, GAC Tech Day 2026 took place at GAC Group's Panyu headquarters. The event highlighted GAC's recent advancements in various areas including New Hybrid, New Body, New Intelligence, New Architecture, and Chinese Chips. This strategic showcase attracted a large audience and emphasized GAC's commitment to innovation.

data.title: Paratus Energy: Announces Leadership Change
data.description: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on April 17, 2026, Paratus Energy Services Ltd. (PLSV) revealed that the Board of Directors has approved the resignation of Robert Jensen as Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of the Company. Jensen will step down from his position, and the search for a new CEO will commence soon.

data.title: RTX's Pratt & Whitney engine powers Northrop Grumman's YFQ-48A Talon Blue autonomous wingman
data.description: In East Hartford, Connecticut, on April 17, 2026, Pratt & Whitney, a subsidiary of RTX (NYSE: RTX), has adjusted commercial engine technology to meet the demands of the Northrop Grumman's YFQ-48A Talon Blue Collaborative Combat Aircraft (CCA). This adaptation will involve the propulsion system for the aircraft.

data.title: LA ROCHE-POSAY SPONSORS JANNIK SINNER...'S SHADOW
data.description: A renowned dermatological skincare brand is revolutionizing the concept of sun protection by introducing a unique sponsorship initiative titled "Shadow Sponsor." This innovative idea challenges the traditional sponsorship model prevalent in sports, where athletes are surrounded by logos. The initiative aims to promote cultural awareness while emphasizing the significance of sun protection. The brand launched this concept in Paris on April 17, 2026, underscoring the need for unconventional approaches to spreading the message of skincare.

data.title: Fla.'s Housing Market: Closed & New Pending Sales Up in March, 1Q
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, the housing market showed positive trends at the start of the spring season in 2026. There was a notable increase in closed sales, pending sales, and pending inventory in March and the first quarter compared to the previous year. These improvements indicate a promising real estate market with growing activity.

data.title: UNFI TEAMSTERS AVERT STRIKE, RATIFY STRONG FIRST CONTRACT
data.description: In a recent development in Pompano Beach, Florida, over 200 warehouse employees at United Natural Foods Inc. (UNFI) have successfully negotiated a significant 31% wage increase, along with enhanced benefits and job security. This positive outcome stemmed from the credible strike threat posed by the workers, who were represented by Teamsters Local 769. The employees voted to ratify these new terms, marking a notable victory for labor rights in the region.

data.title: UVA College and Graduate School of Arts & Sciences and UVA Library Launch AI Literacy and Action Lab
data.description: Charlottesville, Virginia - The University of Virginia College and Graduate School of Arts & Sciences, along with UVA Library, have collaborated to establish the AI Literacy and Action Lab. This initiative aims to establish a higher standard for AI engagement in academia by providing the UVA community with essential skills and critical thinking to comprehend, utilize, and incorporate AI technologies. The Lab's primary goal is to facilitate understanding and integration of AI across various fields. This innovative venture underscores the institution's commitment to advancing AI literacy.

data.title: Zinzino Wins Prestigious DSN Bravo Award and Achieves Top 20 Global Ranking
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden on April 17, 2026, Zinzino Operations AB (publ.), a prominent global provider of personalized nutrition based on testing, has received the esteemed Bravo Award from Direct Selling News (DSN). DSN, a highly regarded authority in the industry, recognized Zinzino Operations AB for its achievements and contributions.

data.title: Egan-Jones Recommends Ingles Markets Shareholders Support Rory A. Held to Improve Capital Allocation and Growth Oversight
data.description: On April 17, 2026, Egan-Jones has advised Class A shareholders of Ingles Markets to cast their votes in favor of Rory A. Held on the GOLD universal proxy card. They suggest withholding votes for company nominees Rebekah Lowe and Dwight Jacobs. Egan-Jones has highlighted the significance of capital as the central concern in this matter.

data.title: Brown Neri Smith & Khan LLP Honored By 2026 Chambers USA Spotlight
data.description: A prestigious litigation boutique in Los Angeles has been acknowledged in the 2026 Chambers USA Spotlight Guide for the second year in a row. Brown Neri Smith & Khan LLP (BNSK) received this recognition following their impressive record of achieving six consecutive victories in jury trials. The firm's expertise in general commercial law has gained significant attention, highlighting their exceptional performance in the legal industry.

data.title: Novogradac Conference to Explore Future of Renewable Energy Development
data.description: Novogradac is organizing the 2026 Spring Renewable Energy Tax Credits Conference in San Diego on May 14-15. The event, scheduled for May 14-15, will bring together professionals in the renewable energy sector to discuss financing tools, policy updates, and market trends that are influencing the clean energy landscape. The conference will be held in San Diego and aims to provide insights into the future of clean energy.

data.title: BougeRV Expands Portable Cooling Lineup with Feature-Rich CRD2 V2.0 and Compact CRH20 Fridges for On-the-Go Living
data.description: Houston, 17th April 2026 - BougeRV, a prominent name in off-grid and outdoor living products, introduced two latest portable refrigerators today. These include the CRD2 V2.0 Dual-Zone Portable Fridge and the CRH20 Portable Fridge. Both fridges are crafted to provide dependable cooling with superior performance capabilities.
